name: CRAFT ARMOR SEALS
prerequisite: Craft (calligraphy) 4 ranks, Craft (mechanical) 6 ranks, Chakra Control 4 ranks, Heroic character.
benefit: You can add Armor Seals to eligible equipment. Any penalties to Learn Fuinjutsu are decreased by 4.

name: CRAFT LIVING PUPPETS
prerequisite: Craft (mechanical) 12 ranks, Knowledge (earth and life sciences) 9 ranks, Craft Puppets.
benefit: You can craft human and animal puppets. See the Puppet chapter.

name: CRAFT POISONS
benefit: You can craft poisons without the usual -4 penalty, and can poison weapons without risking poisoning yourself.

name: CRAFT PUPPETS
benefit: You can use the new Craft Puppet and Modify Core uses of the craft (mechanical) skill.

name: CRAFT SHINOBI DRUGS
benefit: You can craft new shinobi drugs (see the new uses for Craft (Pharmaceutical)), and gain a +2 bonus to saves to resist the initial and secondary damage of such drugs.

name: CRAFT SEALED ITEM
prerequisite: Chakra Control 4 ranks, Craft (calligraphy) or Fuinjutsu 4 ranks.
benefit: You can use the craft (calligraphy) skill to create the new Chakra inscriptions and explosives without increasing the craft time. You are also able to craft Sealed Items.

name: CRAFT WEAPON SEALS
prerequisite: Craft (calligraphy) 4 ranks, Craft (mechanical) 6 ranks, Chakra Control 4 ranks, Heroic character.
benefit: You can add Weapon Seals to eligible equipment. The penalty to learn Fuinjutsu is reduced by 4.

name: GRANDMASTER CRAFTSMAN
benefit: Decrease the cost of base materials for any items you craft by 25% (if the cost is a purchase DC, reduce it by 2). XP costs are not affected.

name: LEGENDARY CRAFTSMAN
benefit: When you craft items requiring an XP cost, you may reduce those costs by 25% (one quarter).

name: MASTER CRAFTSMAN
benefit: Reduce the required time to craft items by 25%. This does not affect the brew time for shinobi drugs, and crafting enhancement seals or sealed objects cannot take less than 4 hours.

name: MASTERCRAFTER
prerequisite: Craft (electrical) 9 ranks, Craft (mechanical) 9 ranks, or both.
benefit:
You can create Mastercraft quality items, grant an existing object a Mastercraft bonus, or improve an object's Mastercraft bonus, as long as you have 9 or more ranks in the Craft skill used to make such an item.

See the D20 Modern rules (p94) for information on Mastercraft objects. Crafting such an item takes twice as long as it would to create a normal version of the item, and the purchase DC for the materials increases by the bonus you want to impart.

The craft check DC increases by +3 for a +1 bonus, by +5 for a +2 bonus, and by +10 for a +3 bonus. In addition, you must pay 250 XP per point of the bonus, which is paid when starting the attempt. If you would drop a level due to this payment, you cannot pay the cost. Modifying an existing object does not decrease the cost or the required time.

Generally speaking, weapons, armor and equipment that grants some kind of bonus to a specific skill check (such as a metal detector granting a bonus on Search checks to find metal objects) can be mastercrafted. When you mastercraft an item, choose which numerical quality of the item to improve (such as attack rolls or damage rolls for weapons, or armor bonus or skill check penalty for armor). The mastercraft quality will either reduce a penalty (if the item carries any) or grant a bonus to d20 rolls that the item is typically used for. An object can only have one mastercraft bonus.
